unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Computer
title: Notes and Documents
drDigitalIntro:
The Notes app is great for quick ideas and lists.
• Jot down shopping lists, recipes, and reminders.
• Notes sync across your devices.
• For longer writing, use a word processor like Google Docs or Word.

playgroundTask.instructions: Practice typing a quick note. Type the words below exactly.

drDigitalSuccess: A quick typed note like this — ready in seconds, saved automatically, accessible on all your devices. That's the power of Notes!
drDigitalHint: Type those three words exactly as shown and the note will be accepted.
